language.label: Language
language.syncFailedDescription: Your language changed on this device, but we could not save it to your account yet.

forbidden.title: You do not have permission to view this page.
forbidden.description: Your current role does not include access to this resource. Request additional privileges if this action is required.
forbidden.hint: Need urgent access? Contact your organization administrator.

notFound.title: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.description: The URL may be outdated, moved, or entered incorrectly. Try navigating back from the homepage.
notFound.hint: If this keeps happening, please verify the link source or contact your workspace administrator.
